euler-dao.name: Euler DAO
euler-dao.description: Euler DAO is responsible for the governance of the Euler protocol.

alphagrowth.name: AlphaGrowth
alphagrowth.description: AlphaGrowth is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure lending markets and structured DeFi products. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

clearstar.name: Clearstar
clearstar.description: Clearstar is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected decentralized markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

k3-capital.name: K3 Capital
k3-capital.description: K3 Capital provide leading institutional asset and risk management in decentralized finance.

valos.name: Valos
valos.description: Valos is a digital asset manager specialising in private credit strategies.

hyperithm.name: Hyperithm
hyperithm.description: Hyperithm maximizes yield by swiftly integrating unique collaterals, providing borrowers with high-return opportunities through active optimization while ensuring effective risk management.
